findings.detail: Admin login existed inside /workspace only. Added /login as a dedicated entry point.
Landing and prototype login links now point to /login instead of hiding login inside /workspace.
Added auth:token helper for smoke tests that need SAFEGUARD_AUTH_TOKEN from a Supabase password user.

manualSmoke: GET /login should render an admin email OTP form when NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are configured.
GET /login should render configuration guidance when public Supabase env values are missing.
npm.cmd run auth:token requires SAFEGUARD_AUTH_EMAIL and SAFEGUARD_AUTH_PASSWORD and prints a Supabase access token for smoke only.
